ogTitle: Lower Tenthill vs Lower Tully: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lower Tenthill and Lower Tully.
heading: Lower Tenthill vs Lower Tully — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lower Tenthill, Queensland and Lower Tully, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lower Tully has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Lower Tenthill (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lower Tenthill or Lower Tully safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lower Tenthill has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Lower Tully scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lower Tenthill scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Lower Tully scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lower Tenthill or Lower Tully?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lower Tully has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
